text.tspan: Cache miss → load from disk · pin_count=1 each
P1, P2 become evictable · P3 marked dirty
Use free frames · LRU list grows
FetchPage(P6) — Pool FULL · No free frames
Evict LRU tail (P1, clean) → load P6 into Frame 0
P1 evicted (LRU tail, clean · no write-back needed)
P2 is DIRTY → write-back to disk before eviction
